components.name: 5-Inch Carbon X-Frame
components.desc: Lightweight and durable for tight maneuvers.

components.name: 7-Inch Long Range Frame
components.desc: Spacious frame for large batteries and smooth flying.

components.name: F4 Flight Controller
components.desc: Standard brain of the drone, great for beginners.

components.name: F7 Advanced FC
components.desc: Faster processor for complex filtering and GPS features.

components.name: 45A 4-in-1 ESC
components.desc: Delivers power to motors. Supports up to 4S LiPo.

components.name: 60A Pro 4-in-1 ESC
components.desc: High current delivery for 6S racing/heavy lifting.

components.name: 2207 2400KV Motors (x4)
components.desc: Punchy motors optimized for 4S voltage.

components.name: 2806 1300KV Motors (x4)
components.desc: High torque motors for heavy 7-inch props on 6S.

components.name: 5.1" Tri-Blade Props
components.desc: Standard freestyle and racing propellers.

components.name: 7.0" Bi-Blade Props
components.desc: Efficient propellers for long-range cruising.

components.name: 4S 1500mAh LiPo
components.desc: Standard 14.8V pack for freestyle.

components.name: 6S 1300mAh LiPo
components.desc: High voltage 22.2V pack for massive speed.

components.name: 6S 4000mAh Li-Ion
components.desc: Heavy, high-capacity pack for cinematic flight time.

components.name: ELRS 2.4GHz Nano
components.desc: Modern, long-range control link.

components.name: 800mW Analog VTX
components.desc: Zero-latency analog video transmitter.

components.name: Digital HD Video Link
components.desc: Crystal clear 1080p video feed to goggles.

components.name: 4K Action Camera
components.desc: High-res recording camera for epic footage.

components.name: 3-Axis Gimbal Camera
components.desc: Stabilized camera for cinematic smoothness.

components.name: RGB LED Strips
components.desc: Looks cool and helps with line-of-sight tracking.

components.name: M10 GPS Module
components.desc: Provides speed data and return-to-home capabilities.

components.name: LiDAR Sensor Array
components.desc: Prevents crashes by detecting objects in flight path.
